research_gate: The owner-approved product rebaseline and clean-room gameplay recovery map establish the candidate space; historical code, runtime claims, Quantum Tunnel product assumptions and unadjudicated assistant proposals remain evidence only.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized clean-room GP0 typed contracts, five fixed authored fixtures, deterministic in-memory replay and verification only. No GP1, historical source code, runtime, engine, database, network, monetization, publishing, Greenfield dependency or C3B substitution authority.
context_health: GP0 implementation is isolated in mindwarp-gameplay-foundation, consumes only the promoted typed C3A seam, keeps authored facts non-C3B, and has a passing focused gate pending independent and workspace verification.

macro_findings: Mind Warp game is the first product customer and GP0 is the sole executing item.
C3A is sufficient for this product-design route; C3B remains blocked and nonconflated.
Yard Atlas and Companion retain independent product authority.
micro_findings: The downstream code-facing seam is exactly WorldGenerationInput, CausalWorldPacket v1 and validate_world_packet.
Fourteen focused tests cover strict codecs, corrected sessions, deterministic reducer/history, hostile state, predecessor-sensitive S5 and foreign-packet rejection.
No physical, optical, runtime, network, Greenfield or presentation implementation is admitted by GP0.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: GP0 is a text and fixed-session design package with no admitted visual asset.

tiers_completed.result: The product topology, recovery map and five-session acceptance shape define the bounded adjudication problem.
Strict concept, session, outcome, C3A reference, state and history records reject authority and currency drift.
Fourteen focused tests replay five corrected sessions, predecessor-sensitive S5 history and the hostile matrix deterministically.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Repository-wide integration may expose stale context, module or cross-workspace assumptions not reached by the focused crate.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Determine whether the isolated GP0 proof composes with every retained Forge invariant without broadening authority.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: Focused, module and workspace preflight followed by one complete Forge gate.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No runtime, historical code, engine, network, monetization or C3B claim enters GP0.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop before GP1 or runtime work and repair any focused, module, workspace or complete-gate regression without broadening the package.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Focused GP0 consistency, project topology, shared route, context and complete Forge verification.

exit_criteria.label: One concise player promise selects the primary fantasy and supporting fantasies.
Explicit non-goals prevent Quantum Tunnel, runtime, multiplayer and platform assumptions from entering GP0.
Five fixed representative sessions express one coherent game across multiple approaches.

unresolved_risks: candidate feature volume could obscure the primary player fantasy
historical Quantum Tunnel assumptions could leak into Main Mind Warp
five sessions could appear varied while requiring incompatible game structures
procedural breadth could be used to avoid proving fixed-content enjoyment
evidence_requirements: preserve clean-room separation from all historical code
select one primary promise and explicit non-goals
define five fixed sessions with preparation encounter consequence return and remembered response
retain C3B Yard Atlas runtime network and monetization boundaries
verification_plan: retain the passing focused GP0 consistency and hostile-matrix receipt
obtain independent read-only review of strictness and authority boundaries
run module-context and workspace preflight without starting the complete gate early
refresh active context and run one complete Forge gate on the exact tree
resume_after: After GP0 is verified and recorded, begin GP1 fixed-content base-loop paper modeling. Do not begin runtime implementation.
evidence: The owner approved the consolidated product-driven plan and implementation.
The product rebaseline defines Forge Core, proven reusable capabilities, domain creative suites and isolated product shells.
The gameplay recovery map provides clean-room candidate evidence and the GP0-GP4 route.
C3A is promoted as the exact dependency-sufficient causal-world seam while C3B remains evidence-blocked.
The owner selected causal_explorer_maker and authorized the isolated GP0 typed implementation.
Playtest corrections removed disguised currencies, made retreat deterministic, constrained combat and froze predecessor-sensitive S1-to-S5 consequences.
The focused GP0 verifier passes fourteen integration tests.

FOCUSED PASS: tools/verify-g1-gp0-gameplay-foundation.ps1; 14 integration tests; strict deterministic replay/history and authority boundaries pass.
